suggestions.title: Refactor authentication module
suggestions.description: The current auth module uses outdated bcrypt version. Suggest upgrading to bcrypt v5 and migrating session management to stateless JWT tokens.

suggestions.title: Add input validation to /api/users endpoint
suggestions.description: The POST /api/users endpoint lacks input validation. Recommend adding Joi or Zod schema validation to prevent malformed data from entering the database.

suggestions.title: Update README with deployment instructions
suggestions.description: README is missing deployment instructions. Suggest adding Docker Compose setup and environment variable documentation.
